prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-FINEPOINTPRECISIONTWEEZERS Product Type: TWEEZER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 2pk ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Precision Non-Magnetic Stainless Steel Tweezers - 5 inch Description: Non-magnetic tweezers are perfect for gold panning, electronics repair, watch repair, craft projects and science experiments. Since these are made of stainless steel, rust and corrosion won't be a problem.

5" tweezers will easily reach into inconvenient, cramped spaces. The sharp tip allows for precise work like picking up gold flakes, small screws, and material samples. They're also great for assembling miniatures, models and figurines.

These tweezers are an essential general purpose precision tool for your collection. Search Terms: tweezer set precision hobbytool set stainless steel jewelry basic gem diamond inspection identification hobbyist stone watch making fine jewelry eye loupe rock hounding facial hair removal beauty fine point Features: - Length: 5" - Material: Stainless Steel - Non-magnetic - Fine point tweezer ideal for picking small flakes of gold - Multipurpose, can be used for many hobbies and craft activities === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-pk 5 inch Stainless Steel Precision Tweezers

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-pk 5 in Gold Panning Precision Tweezers

anthropic.title_differentiation: Non-Magnetic, Fine Point, Gold Panning, Jewelry Repair, Craft Projects, Electronics Work

openai.title_differentiation: Non-Magnetic Stainless Steel, Fine Point, 5 Inch Reach, Rust Resistant, Electronics And Watch Repair
